case_title: STARBUZZ TOBACCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. SAMER HADDAD et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF STARBUZZ TOBACCO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF STARBUZZ TOBACCO, INC.'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S SIXTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IN THE ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE DEMURRER IS WITHOUT MERIT AND SERVES NO USEFUL PURPOSE. THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE STATES FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A DEFENSE TO AT LEAST A PORTION OF THE ALLEGED DEFAMATORY STATEMENTS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STARBUZZ TOBACCO, INC.'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S SIXTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE IN THE ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT is Overruled. The demurrer is without merit and serves no useful purpose. The affirmative defense states facts sufficient to constitute a defense to at least a portion of the alleged defamatory statements. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJ
